metadata.description: Forge — ForgeCode terminal agent as a Claude sidekick. Auto-installs, configures via OpenRouter, and turns Claude into an orchestrator that delegates coding tasks to Forge.

plugins.name: forge
plugins.description: Forge — ForgeCode terminal agent as a Claude sidekick. Automatically installs ForgeCode, configures it with OpenRouter (Qwen 3.6 Plus), and turns Claude into an orchestrator that delegates all coding, file-system, and git tasks to Forge while handling planning and user interaction itself.
